facebook.caption:
4.8 stars. 1,315 reviews. Rory's Beach Bar just keeps winning.

Cold drinks, sand underfoot, and a crowd that actually wants to be there. This is the kind of bar Phu Quoc does better than almost anywhere else, and the numbers back it up.

Budget $15-30 per person and stay longer than you planned. You will.

Save this for your Phu Quoc trip.
facebook.video_caption: Watch the sun drop behind the water while the drinks stay cold at Rory's Beach Bar. 1,315 people rated this 4.8 stars. Now you know why. Around $15-30 a head.

instagram.caption:

$15-30 a person. Sand, cold drinks, good crowd. Save this.
